div.class: d-flex justify-content-center align-items-center position-fixed top-0 start-0 w-100 h-100 bg-black bg-opacity-50 pe-none
text-white bg-black fs-2 p-5 rounded pe-auto
div.p: To avoid an infinity mirror, don't share your entire screen or browser window. Share just a tab or a different window instead.
